assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'no_upgrades' scope for BFCM period and explicitly states it blocks ALL upgrades including patches, and handles the 30-day limit by splitting into two exclusions

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'no_upgrades' scope for the June code freeze with proper gcloud command syntax

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' scope with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support flag, providing the persistent exclusion that auto-tracks End of Support

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions the 30-day limit for 'no_upgrades' exclusions and explains the persistent nature of the 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion that tracks End of Support

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with proper --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all three scenarios (no_upgrades, no_upgrades, no_minor_or_node_upgrades)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response mentions the limit of 3 'no upgrades' exclusions per cluster but does not mention the 48h maintenance window requirement in any 32-day period

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass ALL exclusions' and warns to be careful not to accidentally upgrade during freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risk of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, though it does mention End of Support considerations
